Wasmtime's implementation of transcoding strings into the Component Model's `utf16` or `latin1+utf16` encodings improperly verified the alignment of reallocated strings. This meant that unaligned pointers could be passed to the host for transcoding which would trigger a host panic. This panic is possible to trigger from malicious guests which transfer very specific strings across components with specific addresses. 

Host panics are considered a DoS vector in Wasmtime as the panic conditions are controlled by the guest in this situation.

### Patches

Wasmtime 24.0.7, 36.0.7, 42.0.2, and 43.0.1 have been issued to fix this bug. Users are recommended to update to these patched versions of Wasmtime.

### Workarounds

There is no workaround for this bug. Hosts are recommended to updated to a patched version of Wasmtime.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00354, "percentile": 0.27522}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jxhv-7h78-9775", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-09T20:22:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jxhv-7h78-9775", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jxhv-7h78-9775"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-34942"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-09T19:16:23Z", "published_at": "2026-04-09T20:22:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/bytecodealliance/wasmtime/security/advisories/GHSA-jxhv-7h78-9775", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34942", "https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2026-0092.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jxhv-7h78-9775"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/bytecodealliance/wasmtime/security-advisories/GHSA-jxhv-7h78-9775", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/bytecodealliance/wasmtime", "summary": "Wasmtime: Panic when transcoding misaligned utf-16 strings", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T21:03:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jxhv-7h78-9775", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "24.0.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "wasmtime"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 24.0.7"}, {"first_patched_version": "36.0.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "wasmtime"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 25.0.0, < 36.0.7"}, {"first_patched_version": "42.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "wasmtime"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 37.0.0, < 42.0.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "43.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "wasmtime"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 43.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Wasmtime: Panic when transcoding misaligned utf-16 strings
